title: Fractures 3D
body:
Minecraft Resource Pack focused on bringing more items 3D models in the style of the Trident, Shield, & Spyglass. Includes a variety of additional cosmetic functionality such as extendable Spyglasses, Bundle fullness states, and clipping Shears.

Please note the following features are only available from specific version onwards:

1.21.4+
- 2D Icons
- Extendable Spyglass
- Clipping Shears
- Empty Nametags

1.21.5+
- Named Variants
- Bucketed Axolotl Variants
- Visually Distinct Potions
- Visually Distinct Trimmed Armor

Fractures "3D" & "3Dx" are available as separate downloads.
- Fractures 3D displays items as 2D in the GUI and when dropped.
- Fractures 3Dx displays items fully in 3D

Named Item Variants:

_When naming tools, be sure to include the material, unless specified not to._

- Gladius
- Executioner
- Cathedral Sword

- Cathedral Executioner

**_To use the Texture Pack move the zip file to the Minecraft Resource Pack folder (User > AppData > Roaming > .minecraft > resourcepacks), right click the zip file, and select "Extract All". The Texture Pack should now show up in Minecraft!_**

_(you can also locate the folder by going to Resource Packs in the Minecraft Options and selecting the "Open Pack Folder" Button on the bottom left of the Screen, where you can then Copy/Cut & Paste the file)_

**Note that this Pack only works for Minecraft: Java Edition**
